topIngredients.name: Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)
topIngredients.benefit: Brightens lip tone and fades fine lip lines overnight

topIngredients.name: Vitamin E
topIngredients.benefit: Nourishes and softens lips with antioxidant protection

topIngredients.name: Berry Complex (Antioxidants)
topIngredients.benefit: Natural antioxidants that repair damage and plump lips

verdict: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask is the most effective overnight lip treatment available at any price. The vitamin C and E combination visibly plumps and brightens lips by morning. Cult status is well-deserved.
